channel.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily
channel.description: Daily Tesla news digest and podcast hosted by Patrick in Vancouver. Covering the latest Tesla developments, stock updates, and short squeeze celebrations.
channel.itunes:author: Patrick
channel.itunes:summary: Daily Tesla news digest and podcast covering the latest developments, stock updates, and short squeeze celebrations.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily - Episode 346 - December 04, 2025 at 11:26 AM PST
item.description: Daily Tesla news digest for December 04, 2025 at 11:26 AM PST. TSLA price: $447.43 +0.69 (+0.15%) . 1️⃣ **Tesla’s FSD v14.2.1 can allow texting while driving “depending on traffic” – Elon Musk: 04 December, 2025, 10:45 AM PST, Drive Tesla Canada**...
item.itunes:summary: Daily Tesla news digest for December 04, 2025 at 11:26 AM PST. TSLA price: $447.43 +0.69 (+0.15%) . 1️⃣ **Tesla’s FSD v14.2.1 can allow texting while driving “depending on traffic” – Elon Musk: 04 December, 2025, 10:45 AM PST, Drive Tesla Canada**...
item.itunes:title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily - Episode 346 - December 04, 2025 at 11:26 AM PST

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily - Episode 341 - December 02, 2025 at 12:21 PM PST
item.description: Daily Tesla news digest for December 02, 2025 at 12:21 PM PST. TSLA price: $430.51 +0.37 (+0.09%) . 1️⃣ **Tesla Model Y demand in China is through the roof, new delivery dates show: 02 December, 2025, 11:39 AM PST, Teslarati**...
